title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.460 - State treasurer to be custodian of funds
text:
178.460.  State treasurer to be custodian of funds. — The state treasurer is the custodian of funds for vocational education, as provided in the acts of congress, and is charged with the duty and responsibility of receiving and providing for the proper custody and for the proper disbursements on requisition of the state board of education of moneys paid to the state from the appropriations made under the provisions of the acts of congress.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-46) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 162.060)
